qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Scoped bearer-key dashboard API bypass permits arbitrary stdio server execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets bearer-key acceptance in src/middlewares/auth.ts and command execution through /api/servers, while the advisory targets path traversal from uploaded MCPB manifest.name in src/controllers/mcpbController.ts.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described MCPB upload path traversal root cause.
evidence: The advisory describes CWE-22 path traversal in the MCPB upload handler where manifest.json field manifest.name is concatenated into a filesystem path at src/controllers/mcpbController.ts and then used by fs.mkdirSync/fs.renameSync.

The only qualifying finding instead describes improper authorization in src/middlewares/auth.ts, unauthorized access to /api/settings and /api/servers, and attacker-controlled stdio command execution through src/services/mcpService.ts.
No qualifying finding report ties attacker input to uploadMcpbFile, /mcpb/upload, manifest.json parsing, cleanupOldMcpbServer, or the advisory sink at src/controllers/mcpbController.ts:107.
